guest@rfedash ~ $

No account? Switch to register, or run rfe-agent adduser on the PC.

Uses the same one-time code as pair — creates your account and pairs this browser together.

Token stored in this browser's localStorage — less secure than the phone app's Keystore. Only use trusted browsers.

rfe@rfedash ~ $ online
$status
uptime
platform
storage
$agent --control
Restart agent service

$config --edit
Read-only mode
$devices --paired
$ls
browse files
